action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline UNet (base_channels=64, 3 levels) gave rmse_z500=491.07 (raw). Training curves show overfitting after epoch 3. Analysis: Model too shallow, wrong padding (circular applied to latitude incorrectly), no regularization. Decision: Increase depth to 4 levels, fix padding to replicate latitude, circular longitude, add dropout (0.1), train 20 epochs with early stopping, gradient clipping. Expect improved performance and still within time budget.
